title: Abbreviate Status Options During Board Creation
excerpt: I find that the default status options that populate when creating a status column are tedious to clean up and relabel when I often only need to add one or two statuses to a board. It would be cool to create and save sta…

posts.author: victoriaw (Victoria Weible)
posts.cookedHtml:
I find that the default status options that populate when creating a status column are tedious to clean up and relabel when I often only need to add one or two statuses to a board. It would be cool to create and save status templates to use across boards or create a new status column that is blank without built in statuses.

It would be great if the status column populated with only 3 to 5 prebuilt statuses or none at all. Otherwise, it would be nice to save this option and apply it across boards just like board templates.

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
image940×376 32.5 KB

Why not use column and board templates?
